summary: The diff implements most requirements across REQ-134 through REQ-138. REQ-134, REQ-135, REQ-136, and REQ-137 appear well-covered. REQ-138 (unique explicacao text) is partially visible but truncated, making full verification uncertain. A minor hallucination exists: M10 support in the timeframe duration function was added but not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure the analysis explanation text (explicacao field) is unique per analysis and dynamically references specific detected patterns, trend direction, candle characteristics, confidence score, and momentum count. No hardcoded static string should be returned.
missing_requirements.reason: The localCandleAnalysis.ts diff is truncated and does not show the explicacao generation logic. It is impossible to confirm from the visible diff that the explicacao field is dynamically constructed with pattern names, trend direction, confidence, and momentum values rather than a static or semi-static string.

hallucinated_features.description: Support for M10 timeframe (600 seconds) in getTimeframeDuration in Results.tsx
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly restricts the timeframe selector to M1/M3/M5 only and states 'Do not add new settings options beyond the existing M1/M3/M5 timeframe selector'. The M10 case (return 600) was added to Results.tsx but was never requested.
